quests.hint: DEFINITION: A group or system of interconnected people or things.
quests.explanation: Academic context: The social NETWORK allowed ideas to spread across the continent rapidly.
quests.passage: The social [TARGET] allowed ideas to spread across the continent rapidly.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: A proposed explanation made on the basis of limited evidence.
quests.explanation: Academic context: The scientist proposed a new HYPOTHESIS to explain the observed phenomena.
quests.passage: The scientist proposed a new [TARGET] to explain the observed phenomena.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Eat, drink, or ingest.
quests.explanation: Academic context: Modern lifestyles CONSUME vast amounts of energy and resources.
quests.passage: Modern lifestyles [TARGET] vast amounts of energy and resources.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: A circumstance, fact, or influence that contributes to a result.
quests.explanation: Academic context: Economic stability is a major FACTOR in the growth of developing nations.
quests.passage: Economic stability is a major [TARGET] in the growth of developing nations.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: The end or finish of an event or process.
quests.explanation: Academic context: The CONCLUSION of the study suggested that more research was needed.
quests.passage: The [TARGET] of the study suggested that more research was needed.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Relating to the whole world; worldwide.
quests.explanation: Academic context: Plastic pollution has become a GLOBAL crisis affecting all oceans.
quests.passage: Plastic pollution has become a [TARGET] crisis affecting all oceans.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: The arts and other manifestations of human intellectual achievement.
quests.explanation: Academic context: Ancient Roman CULTURE heavily influenced modern Western civilization.
quests.passage: Ancient Roman [TARGET] heavily influenced modern Western civilization.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: A particular part or feature of something.
quests.explanation: Academic context: One ASPECT of the problem is the lack of funding for local schools.
quests.passage: One [TARGET] of the problem is the lack of funding for local schools.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Calculate a figure or amount.
quests.explanation: Academic context: Mathematicians use algorithms to COMPUTE the values of large numbers.
quests.passage: Mathematicians use algorithms to [TARGET] the values of large numbers.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Following as a result or effect.
quests.explanation: Academic context: The heavy rain and CONSEQUENT flooding caused significant damage.
quests.passage: The heavy rain and [TARGET] flooding caused significant damage.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Consisting of many different and connected parts.
quests.explanation: Academic context: The COMPLEX nature of the problem requires a multifaceted solution.
quests.passage: The [TARGET] nature of the problem requires a multifaceted solution.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Being the only one of its kind; unlike anything else.
quests.explanation: Academic context: Each individual has a UNIQUE genetic code that distinguishes them.
quests.passage: Each individual has a [TARGET] genetic code that distinguishes them.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: A class or division of people or things.
quests.explanation: Academic context: The library organizes books by CATEGORY to make them easier to find.
quests.passage: The library organizes books by [TARGET] to make them easier to find.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Evaluate or estimate the nature, ability, or quality of.
quests.explanation: Academic context: The committee will ASSESS the candidate's performance during the interview.
quests.passage: The committee will [TARGET] the candidate's performance during the interview.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Manage and be responsible for the running of.

quests.passage: The healthcare workers will [TARGET] the vaccine to the local population.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Facts and statistics collected together for reference.
quests.explanation: Academic context: Empirical DATA collected from the satellite confirms the global warming trend.
quests.passage: Empirical [TARGET] collected from the satellite confirms the global warming trend.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: A group of people living in the same place.
quests.explanation: Academic context: The local COMMUNITY came together to rebuild the park after the storm.
quests.passage: The local [TARGET] came together to rebuild the park after the storm.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Buy or obtain for oneself.
quests.explanation: Academic context: Students must ACQUIRE specific skills before entering the workforce.
quests.passage: Students must [TARGET] specific skills before entering the workforce.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Build or erect something.
quests.explanation: Academic context: Engineers will CONSTRUCT a new bridge to replace the old one.
quests.passage: Engineers will [TARGET] a new bridge to replace the old one.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: The available body of facts or information indicating whether a belief is true.
quests.explanation: Academic context: The forensic team discovered crucial EVIDENCE at the crime scene.
quests.passage: The forensic team discovered crucial [TARGET] at the crime scene.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Facts, information, and skills acquired through experience.
quests.explanation: Academic context: Access to digital KNOWLEDGE has revolutionized modern education systems.
quests.passage: Access to digital [TARGET] has revolutionized modern education systems.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Help someone by sharing the work.

quests.passage: Volunteers were asked to [TARGET] in the distribution of food supplies.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Reasoning conducted according to strict principles of validity.
quests.explanation: Academic context: The philosopher used rigorous LOGIC to dismantle the opponent's argument.
quests.passage: The philosopher used rigorous [TARGET] to dismantle the opponent's argument.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: A system of ideas intended to explain something.
quests.explanation: Academic context: In physics, the THEORY of relativity changed our understanding of time.
quests.passage: In physics, the [TARGET] of relativity changed our understanding of time.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: The standard of something as measured against other things.

quests.passage: Academic rigor ensures the high [TARGET] of peer-reviewed journals.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: A particular form of procedure for accomplishing or approaching something.
quests.explanation: Academic context: The lab developed a specialized METHOD for isolating rare proteins.
quests.passage: The lab developed a specialized [TARGET] for isolating rare proteins.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: A main division of a book.

quests.passage: The final [TARGET] of the book summarizes all previous arguments.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Have an effect on; make a difference to.

quests.passage: Changing weather patterns will [TARGET] the migration of many species.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: A particular attitude toward or way of regarding something.

quests.passage: History is often rewritten when viewed from a different [TARGET].

quests.hint: DEFINITION: The manner in which a person behaves.
